evidence.snippet:
FIBERPRO specializes in delivering cutting-edge solutions for precise motion measurement.
Explore our Fiber Optic Gyroscopes (FOG) for accurate angular motion detection and Inertial Measurement Units (IMU) for
precise measurement of acceleration and angular movement in dynamic environments.
![](https://fiberpro.com/theme/fiberpro_theme/tdea/img/pro_roll_01.png)
![](https://fiberpro.com/theme/fiberpro_theme/tdea/img/pro_roll_02.png)

items.notes: Primary product lines are Fiber Optic Gyroscopes (FOG) and Inertial Measurement Units (IMU), explicitly targeting Unmanned Aerial Vehicles and Remotely Operated Underwater Vehicles. Also includes GNSS anti-jamming and integrated INS/GNSS navigation solutions.

evidence.snippet: FIBERPRO, Inc. 26-55, Gajeongbuk-ro, Yuseong-gu, DaeJeon 34113, Korea

The applications of sensors are expanding, and our product line, encompassing fiber optic gyroscopes, inertial measurement units,
and fiber optic temperature sensing systems, is finding applications in various global industries. These include aerospace,

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells FOG sensors and IMUs used in UAVs (Unmanned Aerial Vehicles), ROVs, and autonomous vehicles. Does not make complete drone platforms.

items.name: FG 150

evidence.snippet: [FIBERPRO launches Fiber Optic based Single Axis Gyroscope, FG 150](https://fiberpro.com/news/fiberpro-launches-fiber-optic-based-single-axis-gyroscope/)

items.notes: Used for stabilization and positioning; applications include aircraft camera, AHRS integration, AGV, armoured vehicles.

items.name: FI 200 series (FI 200C, FI 200P, FI 210)
items.product_type: Fiber Optic Gyroscope-based Inertial Measurement Unit

evidence.snippet: **2018\. 12** Developed high performance FOG-based Inertial Measurement Unit(IMU)

items.notes: High-performance tactical-grade FOG IMU; FI 200C datasheet states ITAR FREE. Applications include autonomous vehicles and remotely operated vehicles.

items.name: TS3000
items.notes: Infrastructure monitoring (tunnels, pipelines, power plants) — not drone-specific.

items.name: SAG-SS
items.product_type: Space-grade Single Axis Fiber Optic Gyroscope

evidence.snippet:
**05** Supplied critical space-grade fiber optic gyroscope sensors for installation on the Korean space launch vehicle-II
(Nuri: KSLV-II)(Successfully launch on May 25st)

items.notes: Space-grade FOG; supplied for Korean space launch vehicle KSLV-II (Nuri).

products.notes: FOG product listing page renders empty via HTTP (JavaScript-driven). Product names confirmed from news page, company history, and PDF catalog filenames. Anti-jamming GNSS and integrated navigation products named only in images.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 mention in any fetched page. FI 200C datasheet (PDF) states ITAR FREE but that is a separate designation. Company is South Korean.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention in any fetched page.

evidence.snippet: **11** Obtained AS9100D certification - Quality Management System for Aviation, Space and Defense Organization

readiness.notes: KOSDAQ-listed (2022), AS9100D certified, 10,200 SF cleanroom, 30-country distribution network. Supplies space-grade FOGs to Korean launch vehicles. Catalog SKUs with published datasheets.

tagline: South Korea–based sensor and navigation component supplier specializing in fiber optic gyroscopes, inertial measurement units, and positioning/navigation/timing systems. Named products include FG 150, FI 200 series, TS3000, and FI3300. In production. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of US defense contracts or programs absent.
